---
title: "generate_tests.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\fixtures\new_world_seed\.agents\scripts\generate_tests.py"
loc: 79
complexity: 5
logic_score: 3.45
style_score: 3.86
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 2.55
---

## Intent
The `generate_tests.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on generate_cases. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via generate_cases. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 3.5/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 6 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [argparse](file://argparse)
- [json](file://json)
- [random](file://random)

### Exports
- `generate_cases`
